day5_after_escaped.name: Me
day5_after_escaped.text: *Going down the emergency staircase. The metal steps are slippery from the rain.*

day5_after_escaped_2.name: Me
day5_after_escaped_2.text: *One step. Two steps. Three steps. Coming down as if leaping.*

day5_after_escaped_3.name: Me
day5_after_escaped_3.text: *My feet hit the ground. Asphalt. The back road behind the school.*

day5_after_escaped_5.name: Me
day5_after_escaped_5.text: *It's raining. Raindrops hit my face. Cold. But this coldness... is proof that I'm alive.*

day5_after_escaped_6.name: Me
day5_after_escaped_6.text: *For the first time... since coming to this school, for the very first time, I breathe air outside it.*

day5_after_escaped_7.name: Me
day5_after_escaped_7.text: *I inhaled. Deep. So deep it felt like my lungs might burst. ...The smell is different. Not disinfectant. Not cherry blossoms. Just the smell of rain. Smell of earth. The smell of the world.*

day5_after_escaped_8.name: Me
day5_after_escaped_8.text: *I ran. Anywhere. As far as possible from this school. My legs are trembling. My knees buckle. I still run.*

day5_after_escaped_yuna.name: Me
day5_after_escaped_yuna.text: *Yuna is running beside me. Yuna is crying too.*

day5_after_escaped_yuna_2.name: Me
day5_after_escaped_yuna_2.text: *We ran until we stopped. After getting far enough from the school. Under a streetlight.*

day5_after_escaped_yuna_5.name: Me
day5_after_escaped_yuna_5.text: "We made it. We made it, Yuna."

day5_after_escaped_solo.name: Me
day5_after_escaped_solo.text: *Alone. I ran through the rain. The streetlights sway in the downpour.*

day5_after_escaped_solo_2.name: Me
day5_after_escaped_solo_2.text: *I can't stop. Not far enough yet. More. Further.*

day5_after_escaped_choice.name: Me
day5_after_escaped_choice.text: *I have to tell the world about this evidence. Right now.*

day5_after_police.name: Me
day5_after_police.text: *I called the police. My voice was shaking, but I explained everything. I submitted the memory card and photos as evidence.*

day5_after_police_2.name: Me
day5_after_police_2.text: *Police dispatched. Sirens wailing in the direction of the school.*

day5_after_expose_online.name: Me
day5_after_expose_online.text: *Connected to a convenience store's WiFi. Uploading every photo and document. Social media, news tips, online communities...*

day5_after_captured_3.name: Me
day5_after_captured_3.text: *Fluorescent lights flicker. Zzt. Zzt. The ceiling. A concrete ceiling. The basement.*

day5_after_captured_4.name: Me
day5_after_captured_4.text: *I tried to move my hands. They won't move. ...Leather straps. Wrapped around my wrists. I'm bound to a chair. ...The same as what I saw in Seolhwa's dream. The same chair. The same straps. The same fluorescent lights.*

day5_after_captured_6.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_after_captured_6.text: "...You tried to run? Do you know how worried I was?"

day5_after_captured_8.name: Riin
day5_after_captured_8.text: "Just a blood draw and an IV drip and it's done. This is the last time."

day5_after_captured_9.name: Me
day5_after_captured_9.text: *'Last.' That word weighs heavy. Once this is over... what happens? Like Seolhwa?*

day5_after_captured_10.name: Me
day5_after_captured_10.text: *Nurse Riin disinfects the inside of my elbow. The coldness of the alcohol swab touches my skin. ...I can't give up here. It's not over yet.*

day5_after_captured_resist.name: Me
day5_after_captured_resist.text: *I tensed every muscle in my body. The leather strap digs into my wrist. It hurts. It doesn't matter.*

day5_after_captured_resist_3.name: Riin
day5_after_captured_resist_3.text: "If you move it's dangerous. Stay still —"

day5_after_captured_resist_7.name: Me
day5_after_captured_resist_7.text: *In the darkness... I feel a hand. A cold, transparent hand. It's loosening the leather strap.*

day5_after_captured_resist_8.name: Me
day5_after_captured_resist_8.text: *...Seolhwa. The strap came undone. Seolhwa takes my hand. I thought a transparent hand couldn't grasp anything... but it holds.*

day5_after_captured_resist_9.name: Me
day5_after_captured_resist_9.text: *I'm pulled through the darkness. Muffling my footsteps. Toward the emergency exit.*

day5_after_captured_submit.name: Me
day5_after_captured_submit.text: *...The strength drains from me. No energy left to resist. My head drops. My eyes close.*

day5_after_captured_submit_2.name: Me
day5_after_captured_submit_2.text: *The syringe touches my arm. The needle goes in. Cold liquid spreads through the veins.*

day5_after_captured_submit_3.name: Me
day5_after_captured_submit_3.text: *...It gets warm. It feels like my body is melting. My thoughts blur.*

day5_after_captured_submit_4.name: Me
day5_after_captured_submit_4.text: *There's something... I'm forgetting. What am I forgetting? It was important... what was it...*

day5_after_stayed.name: Me
day5_after_stayed.text: *Ms. Eunsu takes my hand and helps me up.*

day5_after_stayed_3.name: Me
day5_after_stayed_3.text: *The teacher leads me to the classroom. We walk down the corridor. My footsteps and the teacher's heels echo.*

day5_after_stayed_4.name: Me
day5_after_stayed_4.text: *The classroom door opens. Sea is seated. Nurse Riin is standing. Everyone is smiling.*

day5_after_stayed_5.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_after_stayed_5.text: "Your teacher will protect you from everything. You don't need to worry about anything."

day5_after_stayed_6.name: Me
day5_after_stayed_6.text: *I sat down. Sea sits next to me. Nurse Riin hands over a cup of tea.*

day5_after_stayed_7.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_after_stayed_7.text: "...{name} just needs to be by your teacher's side. Forever."

day5_after_stayed_8.name: Me
day5_after_stayed_8.text: *Ms. Eunsu is smiling. A warm smile.*

day5_after_stayed_9.name: Me
day5_after_stayed_9.text: *...Was this smile always this frightening? No. It's not frightening. ...It's not frightening. ...Why isn't it frightening?*

day5_after_stayed_10.name: Me
day5_after_stayed_10.text: *I drank the tea. It's warm. It feels good. ...There's something I feel like I'm forgetting. What was it. ...It's fine. I can forget it. This place is safe.*
